query:
SELECT
                d.id as entity_id,
                d.name,
                regexp_replace(
                    d.name,
                    $6,
                    '<macro_em>\1</macro_em>',
                    'gi'
                ) as name_highlighted,
                d."updatedAt" as updated_at
            FROM "Document" d
            WHERE d.id = ANY($1)
                AND d."deletedAt" IS NULL
                AND d.name ILIKE $2
                AND (
                    $4::timestamptz IS NULL
                    OR (d."updatedAt", d.id) < ($4, $5)
                )
            ORDER BY d."updatedAt" DESC, d.id DESC
            LIMIT $3
